name: no_flags_no_squeeze
description: para_armed=False AND breakeven_locked=False with a NON-IDENTITY squeeze multiplier (0.5) supplied. The squeeze MUST be ignored. Output = max(safe_vol*mult, min_stop) unchanged. Catches an impl that applied squeeze unconditionally.
derivation: safe_vol = 2.0. raw = 3.0. max(3.0, 0.30) = 3.0. (False OR False) = False -> no squeeze. Output = 3.0. If a wrong impl unconditionally applied the squeeze, output would be 1.5 (off by 2x).
